programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: ¿Qué es un carioca? Los nativos son adorables bribones que encuentran formas de evitar el trabajo, prefiriendo la playa, coqueteando, frecuentando restaurantes y bares. Tony, bajo la tutela de un carioca ejemplar, prueba el estilo de vida.

programme.title: El pescado en el plátillo
programme.desc: El enérgico chef y experto en mariscos Spencer Watts muestra cómo las cortezas y los revestimientos agregan una textura tentadora al rico atún y a las ostras frescas y picantes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Two sets of scientists probe a woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1995, the founder of American Atheists disappeared with one of her sons, her granddaughter and $500,000 in gold coins. The police investigated several suspects, including David R. Waters, who worked for American Atheists.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Two eyewitnesses may hold the key to the death of a motorcycle gang member.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1984, a passerby finds the torso of a woman in a cardboard box. A forensic entomologist analyzes nearby insect activity to determine when the victim was killed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The investigation into the kidnapping and rape of an 18-year-old Ohio woman is aided when the victim returns hours after the incident occurred. With her help, the police are able to track the assailant to his front door.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The police investigate when a severed leg is discovered among garbage. Conventional means of identifying the victim are impossible, leading investigators to rely on DNA, forensic anthropology and toxicology.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In a 1992 murder case, the autopsy of a cremated body turns up telltale clues of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, Indiana police identified Richard Alexander as the “River Park Rapist” who assaulted four women that year. Later, DNA analysis casts doubt on his conviction.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After the 1996 murder of Seattle residents Raquel Rivera and Jay Johnson, evidence from the couple's dog eventually ties one of the murderers to the scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Soon after becoming pregnant by Dr. Maynard Muntzing, firefighter Michelle Baker's health quickly deteriorates. Eventually, she raises suspicions that Muntzing is doing her harm.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the 1980s, a trio of unsolved murders occurred in Wichita Falls, Texas. Later, a fourth murder from the same time period provided the police with far more than they realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The disappearance of Philadelphia college athlete Aimee Willard is investigated after her car is found on the roadside. When her body is found, the police find unusual marks and DNA evidence that eventually lead to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: While investigating the apparent overdose suicide of Reverend Bill Guthrie's wife, detectives recover incriminating files from Bill's computer and learn of his infidelity.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The 1987 disappearance of Houston resident Tracy Jo Shine is recalled. The investigation went cold until 2000 when a "cold case squad" learned that the woman's ex-boyfriend Michael Neal had bragged about killing her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Doctors cannot pinpoint the source of a businessman's illness.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After 6-year-old Michelle Lee Dorr went missing, her father confessed to murdering her. But investigators soon poked holes in his story, leaving the case unsolved for 14 years.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The 1996 investigation into 48-year-old Martha Hansen's murder is helped by a legal requirement that bars have video cameras installed on the premises.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The murders of an elderly couple leave police stumped until, two years later, they receive a major break. A jeweler looking through old newspaper clippings recognizes a necklace the female victim wore as having been pawned in her own shop.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of 9-year-old Jessica Knott, police use a garbage bag to connect suspect James Edward Crow, Jr. to the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tooth or Consequences
programme.desc: An investigation into the murder of Katie Poirier is stymied by the lack of a body. Finally, investigators use a single tooth found among some charred remains to identify her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The only clue recovered from a shooting is a twelve-guage shotgun. Scientists use unique methods to lift the serial number from the weapon to trace it to its owner

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A serial arsonist starts several fires that cause millions of dollars worth of damage and the deaths of three people. He is discovered, partly through the use of forensic hypnosis.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A three-year-old develops a respiratory condition. His father has Alzheimers. An investigator reveals that their ill health is due to mold in their modern home.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A murder investigation in Florida crosses jurisdictions from New York and Jamaica. The police rely on cell phone mapping, wiretapping and a host of forensic evidence to link a suspect to a murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman convicted of killing her mother in a car fire is granted a new trial. An expert witness has a different opinion as to how the fire started and, if proven, would clear the woman of any culpability.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Authorities track a kidnapper who let his victim write a last will and informed the family of her murder. A phone number written on a previous page left a lasting impression, which helped to convict.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A man dies in his home after a long history of heart disease. A few weeks after the funeral, rumors surface that the death was no accident.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: The heavily armored Pangolin proves to be too tough of a nut for the Rangers to crack. Their only hope is a powerful weapon called the Jungle Mace, which lies in the hands of retired Pai Zhuq teacher, Master Phant.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Casey loses his $5 tip to a young boy named Josh, who wants to buy himself a kite. Can Casey teach Josh that the easy way isn't always the right way, while also figuring out how to put a stop to the slippery Slickagon?

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Theo spreads his focus too thin, leading his teammates to question his effectiveness in battle.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Thanks to Carnisoar's training, Jarrod has become more ruthless than ever. Camille is pushed aside for the last time, and thanks to some advice from Lily, decides to get a new master.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Casey anxiously awaits the arrival of his second master, but RJ begins to feel forgotten as a result. It gets worse for him when the master of the Shark technique arrives, and turns out to be his estranged father, Master Finn!

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: After another victorious battle against Camille's monsters, the Rangers feel they are unstoppable. RJ warns them about being overconfident. He tells them to train on their basic stances.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: With RJ captured, the Rangers must travel to the spirit world to find the last 3 remaining masters. Theo, Lily, and Casey must face their own childhood fears in order to pass their test.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Everyone is still making fun of Lily for being too nice. After a battle with Porcupongo, Lily is fed up with being so nice and shows her bad side. Lily becomes a rude customer at JKP and refuses to help the other Rangers.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: After his last battle with Dai Shi, RJ has major problems controlling his animal spirit. He turns into a werewolf and becomes a big threat to anyone around him. RJ learns to lean on his friends and not run away from them when he has a problem.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Casey really has grown up from being a cub at Pai Zhuq. He's taken initiative and stepped up to being the leader of the group. But now with RJ as a Ranger, things are a little different. Casey feels like a cub all over again.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Grizzaka sends an evil spirit to cause trouble between RJ and his animal spirit again. The hero in RJ causes him to save Flit. RJ tells the spy to go home but Flit tells of his own curse.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Dominic was sent out by Master Mao to find purpose for his life. He finds out that RJ and the others are really Power Rangers and he wants to join them. He now knows that this is his purpose in life.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Jarrod has found the Rhino Nexus. All he needs is the Control Dagger key to tap into the power. Dominic is startled by a dream of Master Mao telling him to protect the Control Dagger as it holds the key to his destiny.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: With Control Dagger in hand, Dai Shi aims to unlock the Nexus for himself. The Overlords refuse to let such power fall into the hands of the Rangers or Dai Shi.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: The Phantom Beasts were a notorious force in the Beast Wars. The crystal eyes hold the power to bring back these Phantom Beasts. Our heroes must protect these eyes before Dai Shi or the Overlords resurrect such evil beasts.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: The Phantom Beasts have been brought back to life. Dai Shi has them prove their loyalty by capturing the three masters. The Phantom Beasts capture the masters and use the masters to create the Spirit Rangers.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: The Phantom Beasts control the masters and call forth the Spirit Rangers. They look and fight exactly like Power Rangers. Our heroes are in for a real fight as they face the spirits of their own masters.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: The Spirit Rangers could be the end of our heroes if something isn't done. RJ takes the risk of destroying his father. Trusting his instincts, he finds that his dad was prepared if this should happen.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy gets another shot at being a star when a talent scout for the movies comes to town. Casting for the production agrees to audition Lucy after she gives him an impromptu performance of "There's No Business Like Show Business" with the Mertzes.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: A magazine test has gotten Lucy into a tizzy. Lucy and Ricky take a test called "How to Rate Your Marriage." One of the questions in the quiz asks about old flames. When Lucy rattles off a list of old boyfriends, Ricky feels the need to compare.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Out of money, and in need of a million dollar idea, Lucy goes into the business of selling salad dressing. Marketing her salad dressing on TV, Lucy elicits Ethel's help with the advertisement.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy plays the dominant parent role in their son's life. Realizing that he needs to spend more time with his son, Ricky agrees to spend his vacation at home to care for little Ricky.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos are hosting an evening with friends. When the last guest to arrive introduces his date—all the men at the party fawn over her. Disgusted by the men's behavior, Lucy and Ethel begin to doubt their own feminine wiles.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ricky's thirteenth anniversary is rapidly approaching. In an outward show of affection, they buy each other gifts—golf clubs for Ricky and fur for Lucy.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos are being interviewed for a "day-in-the-life" magazine article on happy married couples. The interviewer arrives at 7 AM just in time to encounter Lucy making breakfast in a frilly lace apron, while Ricky walks in wearing a smoking jacket.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Mertzes get a pair of new tenants. Sam and Nancy Johnson are from Texas and reportedly have inside knowledge of a certain oil stock that is about to shoot through the roof. Lucy and Ethel are excited by the prospect, but Fred and Ricky have doubts.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: How long can Ricky Ricardo go, without losing his temper? When Lucy buys a new hat for $49.50, Ricky goes ballistic. To make a point, Lucy bets Ricky the cost of the hat that he'll lose his temper long before her next purchase.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Hurt that no one seems to care for his home movies, Ricky declares that he will never show them another feature of his...not even the TV pilot he's creating. Jealous of his project, Lucy enables the help of the Mertzes and creates her own musical western.

programme.desc: Ricky scoffs at his wife and Ethel when they adamantly participate in the hunt for the "Bonus Buck" that will win them prize money from a newspaper contest. Later, Ricky discovers one of the lucky bucks in his own wallet.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy desperately wants to accompany her husband on his concert tour of Hawaii, but Ricky can't afford to bring her along. Unsatisfied, Lucy decides she'll win a trip for herself and neighbors, The Mertzes, by entering a television game show contest.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: In an attempt to compete with her wealthy friends, Lucy pledges $500 (that she doesn't have) to charity. Luckily, Ethel spots an ad in Billboard magazine willing to pay $500 to anyone willing to perform a stunt to publicize a new movie, Women From Mars.

programme.desc: Lucy wants to be a published author after hearing about another housewife who made a fortune doing it. Ricky and the Mertzes don't like it when they discover Lucy's book plays too close a resemblance to real life including anecdotes from their own lives.

programme.desc: Lucy organizes an orchestra among her girlfriends, but it plays so horribly that she asks her bandleader husband, Ricky, to come to a rehearsal and give them some advice. His direction does little to help.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una persona del pasado del Abuelo reaparece en su vida. El Noruego tiene problemas dentales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo consigue una ocupación donde se siente como pez en el agua, mientras que Peluzín entra en un proyecto experimental que le traerá muchos problemas a todos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está despilfarrando su fortuna peor que nunca, mientras que Pitipú, Don Sebas y Gaspar buscan solucionar el problema de plomería del edificio Pino.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una hilarante parodia de A Christmas Carol, en la que al Abuelo se le aparecen fantasmas del pasado presente y futuro. Olaf es Timmy y Peluzin el fantasma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar invita a la familia a un viaje muy especial para él. Peluzin se pega al plan.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia abre un grupo de WhatsApp para estar más conectados pero este se sale de control, mientras que Peluzín aprrovecha una noticia de un asesinato para sacarle dinero a Pitipú.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar pierde su trabajo y se desconecta del mundo mientras que el Abuelo y el Noruego empiezan un negocio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia del Barrio se va de vacaciones a Acapulco, invitados por Gaspar. Después de una gran borrachera en el Baby'O, el abuelo amanece en la casa de Acapulco Shore.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño virus se empieza a propagar, infectando a todos en el edificio, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan buscan revivir a Irmita después de que Peluzín la deja en coma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los Lambreton son los encargados de organizar la fiesta navideña de este año en su casa, mientras que Don Sebas extraña a su país natal y piensa en regresar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar atraviesa una crisis en su periodo de entrenamiento en Estados Unidos, mientras que el resto de la familia decide alcanzar a Gaspar

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El abuelo se ahoga con un hueso de pollo y LFDB se ve forzada a buscar ayuda de emergencia, mientras que el Noruego y Peluzín deciden ingresar a un gimnasio y competir por los resultados.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú busca ayudar a Don Sebas con su problema de peso, mientras que Peluzín y el Noruego buscan aprovecharse de un afamado cantante del edificio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El colegio organiza un viaje todo pagado a Acapulco para reforzar la relación "Padres e Hijos", y todos buscan colarse a esa vacación, así tengan hijos o no. Al final la vacación no resulta como esperaban.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y Peluzín buscan lucran aprovechando el próximo paro de agua en la ciudad, mientras que el Noruego nos revela por fin después de tanto tiempo el porque de su miedo al baño.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego, traumado por asistir a una corrida de toros, cambia su estilo de vida. Jonathan se entera de una noticia que cambiara su vida.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego no cumple con sus responsabilidades con la casa por lo que es expulsado por Gaspar. El Noruego se embarca en una travesía sin saber que lleva un ángel guardián.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa un con Genio quien le conceda varios deseos, mientras que el Noruego decide lanzarle una fiesta sorpresa de cumpleaños a Olaf para que recupere su infancia perdida.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está cansado de la mala racha que ha tenido con las mujeres y busca el consejo de Pitipú, mientras que Peluzín le pide ayuda a Jonathan para poder encontrar a su verdadero padre.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar encuentra por fin el amor de manera inesperada mientras que el Pasita, triste por las limitaciones de su edad avanzada consigue la receta para la eterna juventud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Don Sebas se casa en una isla tropical y todos viajan a la boda. Sin embargo, los descuidos del Abuelo hacen que casi se pierda el evento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego descubre por accidente que cuenta con poderes mentales y decide aprovecharlos para su conveniencia, mientras que el Diablo sube del inframundo para buscar un nuevo asistente en Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelúzín se roba un paquete de la puerta de Don Sebas, volteando a todo el edificio de cabeza, mientras Jonathan, cansado del bullying del Abuelo decide darle una lección.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide recuperar a su antigua mascota tlacuache llamada Chofri, mientras que el Abuelo atraviesa por un lapso de demencia senil y depende de Gaspar salvarlo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo encuentra la manera de aprovecharse del sistema de seguros a costa de Peluzín. Mientras Gaspar les encarga al Noruego y a Jonathan que recojan en el aeropuerto a un familiar que viene de visita de los Estados Unidos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego sigue con su plan de casarse con la Ivanka de cera, mientras que el Abuelo y Peluzín afianzan su relación después de su gran viaje

programme.desc: Stevie stuns his family with a shocking announcement, Karlie encourages Rasheeda to date her hunky new trainer, and Jessica Dime hears her baby's heartbeat for the first time.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: Just Brittany's comments leave Erica furious and fracture her friendship with Keely, Kelsie encourages Kirk to get his family back, and Momma Dee is back on the scene.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: Just Brittany and Keely's friendship goes up in flames, Rasheeda sets clear boundaries with Kirk, and Stevie wins over Estelita.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: Scrappy and Bambi are back in Atlanta, Keely is confronted by her baby daddy at Tokyo's album release, and Tokyo suspects that Tabius is cheating on her.

programme.title: Under the Sea
programme.desc: Get closer to nature and deepen your understanding of our complex natural world. Filmed in the highest quality, Love Nature offers viewers powerful stories of nature's beauty and wonder from around the globe.

programme.title: Deadly Australians
programme.desc: Exploring Australia's complex waterways to reveal the continent's deadliest animals, from snakes and crocodiles to archer fish and sea eagles.

programme.title: Hotspots
programme.desc: The species of Madagascar have evolved over millions of years in isolation.

programme.title: Secrets of Wild Australia
programme.desc: A vast island continent of almost 3 million miles, Australia is home to many unusual animals on the planet.

programme.title: Wild Korea
programme.desc: Korea is known as a modern, high-tech nation, but beyond the bustle of the cities exists a land of stunning natural beauty and remarkable wildlife including the beautiful goshawk, the bottleneck dolphin and the curious raccoon dog.

programme.title: After the Wildfires
programme.desc: Charting the long-term recovery of wildlife in the aftermath of Australia's catastrophic bushfires through stories of hope, human intervention and resilience; an urgent message to safeguard the environment before it is too late.

programme.title: Wildlife ER
programme.desc: Soothing a bitten koala and itchy possums.

programme.title: Wildlife ER
programme.desc: Tackling pet hoarding and a deadly snake.

programme.title: Croc and Hippo Watch with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Steve gets a first-hand look at what makes Nile crocodiles so deadly and helps a team of scientists relocate a bunch of man-eaters.

programme.title: Kui Buri: Thailand's Hidden Eden
programme.desc: Visit a jungle paradise that is a model for national parks around the world.

programme.title: Wild Argentina: Extreme Earth
programme.desc: The filmmakers shed light on the water worlds of Argentina and its diverse creatures, from anacondas to the great dusky swifts that rule the world's largest waterfall.

programme.title: Dawn to Dusk
programme.desc: The sun rises on a day in May and the animals of the American tropics get ready to beat the heat.

programme.title: Alpha
programme.desc: Find out what it takes to be the leader of a wolf, deer, rhino, or lion pack.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A rare bottle of Bordeaux, commissioned by Napoleon for his beloved wife, Josephine, is to be given to the President of the United States as a Christmas present.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A criminal gang has hidden a microfilm containing the manufacturing process for artificial diamonds, developed by NASA, in one of Inspector Zenigata's molars. Determined to get his hands on that microfilm, Lupin must capture Inspector Zenigata.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Forward Hees, the world's richest man, suddenly dies a mysterious death and leaves a large ruby to Fujiko in his will. After inheriting the ruby, Fujiko comes down with the same mysterious fever as Hees…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A Count challenges Lupin to steal a gemstone named Dracula's Tear from on board his airship, the Hendenburg. However, also on board the ship are several formidable detectives: Homes III, Detective Archer, Koojisuke Kaneda and Inspector Zenigata.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is suffering from Transformation Sickness, an illness that transforms him into a cruel, cold-blooded criminal at the stroke of midnight, and leaves him with no recollection of his murderous crime spree in the morning…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A small Arab nation has received a blackmail notice. Pay a $100 million or have their oil fields blown up. Lupin targets the money, but his plans are hindered when he finds out the culprits are using human bombs.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Black Panther, the world's largest emerald, gets its name from the black panther that appears inside it when a light shines on it at a particular angle. After capturing this one-of-a-kind emerald, Lupin hides it in a museum to retrieve it later…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Vault maker Marukin Safe Company is forced into bankruptcy after Lupin cracks open their impenetrable safes. To test his own skills, Marukin's son challenges Lupin to open a safe he has designed…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: While trying to snag General Hatler's prize medallion, which contains a fifty-carat ruby, Lupin inadvertently reels in Hatler's biggest secret, his toupee! An enraged General Hatler orders Lupin and his gang to be killed.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Upon returning to Japan, Goemon finds his master on the brink of death. Furthermore, Jinkuro, a fellow disciple, had stolen half of the scroll containing the Secret Arts of the Iga Ninja. Will Goemon be able to avenge his master?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Jigen are in a remote area pursing a mysterious treasure, when they save a woman being chased by hoodlums. The woman invites the two back to her sister's manor, which is full of beautiful women…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A mysterious woman who claims to be Fujiko's aunt, gives Lupin an ultimatum: Find Marshal Rommel's lost gold or die! First, Lupin must decipher the location of the gold, written in ancient hieroglyphs.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The great thief Nezumi-Kozou Jirokichi IV appears before Goemon and reveals that their ancestors competed in the first International Thieves Championship together, but were defeated by Lupin's grandfather, Arsène Lupin…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The warden of an African prison is holding Fujiko captive. Lupin and his gang infiltrate the prison and attempt to break Fujiko out, but they become the target of the Iron Lizards, robotic devices developed to chase down fugitives!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Linda, a beautiful dancer, has stolen Jigen's heart and a vengeful Meyer has taken Fujiko hostage. Believing the women they love are in danger and unaware that Linda and Meyer are working together, Lupin and Jigen are set up to kill each other…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: According to legend, a stamp named the Cinderella Shadow is said to make its owner a princess. Lupin and his gang pull off the heist, but a girl name Alice who also wants the stamp tags along. Will the little girl get her royal wish?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has sent a notice declaring he will steal all the cash from every bank in Paris. Detective Melon, the granddaughter of Inspector Garimard, is chosen to catch Lupin alongside Inspector Zenigata.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has many secret techniques up his sleeve, and one of them is his Levitation Technique. In order to get their hands on this technique, a crime syndicate plots a dirty trick, where a fake Lupin tortures a man known as X8 and frames the real Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Inspector Zenigata get kidnapped and the two are forcibly conscripted into the Foreign Legion in Morocco. Lupin and Inspector Zenigata make a run for it, but not before they're shackled together at the neck.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Beautiful Swedish twins, Latica and Anita, are engaged in a battle to the death over the Viking treasure map concealed on their backs. In disguise, Lupin learns the map's secret, but the map possesses an additional secret.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A hit has been ordered on Lupin and Puma, a formidable hitman who specializes in long-range attacks, is on his trail! Lupin takes his chances with a close range, one-on-one showdown against Puma, but the plan seemingly backfires and Lupin is shot…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Orion's Crown has been stolen and is up for grabs at a black-market auction. Lupin has his eyes on both the crown and the auction money, but first he must outsmart the other parties vying for the crown, including Fujiko.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A two-thousand-year-old casket has been excavated. Inside the casket is Camilla, a beautiful woman in a near-death state, holding a golden statuette of the Virgin Mary. Lupin attempts to steal the golden statuette, but things don't go as planned…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang are attending a party in Africa, waiting for an opportunity to snatch a rare black pearl. However, their plan goes awry when a gang of gorillas crashes the party and steals the black pearl.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Massive riches have been hidden inside Tsukikage Castle. Lupin and his gang must decipher a code to find out the whereabouts of this great treasure. Wii Lupin be able to locate the treasure before his rivals do?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Jigen head to Mongolia in search of Genghis Khan's treasures. Meanwhile, Goemon is visiting his ancestor's grave to pay his respects when he encounters Fujiko, who is in search of Yoshitsune Minamoto's buried treasure.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The ICPO chief promises to erase Fujiko's criminal record in exchange for her cooperation in arresting Lupin. Up against an ego-bruised Inspector Zenigata and a determined Fujiko, have Lupin's heisting days come to an end?

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Todo parece indicar que el desmadre este año lo empiezan a poner los nuevos discípulos. Victor trata de seducir a Elettra, Isaac juega con Adela para ver quien tiene el control y Ferre tontea todo el tiempo seduciendo a Eva hasta que se pelean.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega un nuevo ex y es alguien muy esperado, pero todo lo que ha ocurrido en las vacaciones impide la reconciliación. Spencer está decepcionado de Oscar y Norma tiene cruda moral. Renata ve con cariño a Elías y Sargento se pone celoso.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega un nuevo ex que causa celos. Renata llora por Sargento, y Rocío discute otra vez con Alejandro y sobrepasa sus límites. Hay una votación sorpresa y una decisión que deja a todos en shock. Ernesto quiere dar el siguiente paso con Montse.

programme.title: Catfish Colombia
programme.desc: Alejandra tiene una relación en línea hace tres años con Andrés David. Ambos viven en la misma ciudad pero hasta el día de hoy no se han conocido en persona ni por videollamadas.

programme.title: Catfish Colombia
programme.desc: Nataly lleva un año hablando con Ángel por medio de las redes sociales y está muy enamorada de él, pero teme que él no sienta lo mismo porque no han podido verse en persona ni por videollamada.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega un nuevo ex y es alguien muy esperado, pero todo lo que ha ocurrido en las vacaciones impide la reconciliación. Spencer está decepcionado de Oscar y Norma tiene cruda moral. Renata ve con cariño a Elías y Sargento se pone celoso.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega un nuevo ex que causa celos. Renata llora por Sargento, y Rocío discute otra vez con Alejandro y sobrepasa sus límites. Hay una votación sorpresa y una decisión que deja a todos en shock. Ernesto quiere dar el siguiente paso con Montse.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega a la villa un nuevo ex y viene dispuesto a la reconciliación. Rocío no está interesada en Daniel, Renata y Sargento dejan que el amor fluya, y Montse y Ernesto anuncian su noviazgo. En la fiesta, Brenda completa su venganza.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Hay un nuevo ex y quiere recuperar a su antigua pareja, pero la cita cambia los planes. Una pareja termina antes sus vacaciones y Spencer se abre con Norma. Rocío hace una visita exprés a la Master Suite. Hay una ceremonia de compromiso.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP: La manada más salvaje
programme.desc: Lizbeth y Diana se perfilan como las más odiadas del grupo, mientras que el nuevo ex le quita el lugar a Christian. Yurgenis avanza con Brandon y una fiesta salvaje rompe con todo lo que ellos creían de sí mismos.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP: De la broma a la guerra
programme.desc: La tablet manda a Ana e Isaac a una cita romántica y Leslie tambalea. La sala tornado abre sus puertas y sus vientos traen muchas dudas. Lizbeth y Diana planean una broma que no termina nada bien. La llegada del próximo ex podría ser devastadora.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP: El tiburón tiene colmillo
programme.desc: Los nuevos ex abren las puertas a más problemas. Diana se pone malacopa y amarga la fiesta más dulce. Un tiburón de dos patas visita la villa y lo que parecía un chiste termina siendo una verdadera amenaza. La primera Love Suite es para...

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP: Shots con sentimiento

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.desc: The queens must makeover family members and vogue the house down. Aubrey Plaza (Parks and Recreation) guest judges.

programme.title: Deadliest Warrior

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: The survivalists begin to face threats as they work to secure food and finish their shelters. One participant is confronted by one of Mongolia's deadliest predators, while another fights a debilitating illness.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: Mongolia shows how devastating its climate can be as a monstrous storm assails the remaining survivalists. The participants are forced into their shelters and can only hope they'll hold up to the storm.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths must use steel from old nautical equipment to forge weld their signature blade. After two fierce rounds, two remain with five days to forge the Kachin Dao, a deadly headhunting sword.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths must create a canister Damascus billet from which they must forge a dagger. Only two enter the final round where they must recreate an ancient Roman weapon known as the Scissor.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths go to a scrapyard to create their signature blade using only harvested metal and a coal forge. After two rounds, the two remaining must recreate a fearsome battle weapon, the Kampilan.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When a passenger train collides with a freight train carrying toxic chemicals, Don, Charlie and the team begin to investigate if foul play was involved.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and his team are called in to help a veteran FBI agent track down a con man who has eluded him for years. Also, Agent McGowan hands down his decision on Charlie's security clearance and Don's future with the FBI.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: The team hunts a crew stealing high-end goods from a shipping service and looks to an employee with savant-like abilities to lead them to those behind the scheme. Also, when one of Don's men is killed on duty, he questions his faith in the FBI.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: While on a date, David catches a disappearing act at a magic show but quickly becomes involved in the performance when the magician really vanishes.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When the death of a family friend is ruled an accident, Don and Charlie investigate, only to make a startling discovery.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: The bombing of an influential charity's headquarters forces the team to sift through various rumors about the true reach of the organization's power.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team searches for social worker Eric Hayes (REED DIAMOND), who disappeared after forcibly removing a 7-year-old girl from the home of her violent father and desperate mother.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team searches for Audrey West, a young mother with one month to live. She was last seen leaving a gathering of fellow cancer patients with Ryan, a guy who crashed the party.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team searches for a high school basketball star, Ted Soros, who vanishes the night he scores the winning basket and secures his team's position in the state championships.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: When a regional air traffic controller, Neil Rawlings (FRANK GRILLO), goes missing, Jack and the team learn that he had been distracted recently but was otherwise an exemplary employee.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team searches for Barry Rosen (MICHAEL DUNN), a competitive eating champion who vanishes after winning a $5,000 prize in a chili-eating contest.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team searches for Abby Horton, a promising young artist who secretly photographed strangers who were experiencing intense personal moments and then later painted them.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jack and the team search for Jason Turner, a young water plant foreman who disappears hours after his life is threatened by Earl Dooley, a longtime employee who was enraged when Jason laid him off.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jack and the squad interrogate a suburban tourist, Rob Darcy, who claims someone kidnapped his wife from their hotel room. But nothing Rob says can be verified.

programme.title: Next of Kin
programme.desc: When policeman Truman Gates' younger brother is murdered by the mob, Gates is torn between his desire to uphold the law and his lust for revenge. But Gates' older brother will not be satisfied until every member of the Chicago mob is dead.

programme.title: Bound
programme.desc: Caesar’s a guy who launders money for the mob. What’s the last thing that would come between a sleazy wise guy like Caesar and that money? A couple of women with brains to die for and bodies to match.

programme.title: Kiss the Girls
programme.desc: Eight kidnapped women. All beautiful. All talented. All in danger of having their lives cut cruelly short if police detective Alex Cross and key witness Kate McTiernan can’t locate the elusive “collector” who calls himself Casanova.

programme.title: Get the Gringo
programme.desc: A career criminal nabbed by Mexican authorities is placed in a tough prison, where he learns to survive with the help of a young boy.

programme.title: Drive
programme.desc: A Hollywood stunt performer (Ryan Gosling) who moonlights as a wheelman discovers that a contract has been put on him after a heist gone wrong.

programme.title: Trapped
programme.desc: The Jennings fight for their daughter's life after she is kidnapped by an experienced gang of thieves.

programme.title: The Crow: Wicked Prayer
programme.desc: The fourth film in the dark superhero franchise is an epic new action tale. After an ex-con tries to straighten out his life, he and his girlfriend are brutally murdered by a renegade gang. A mysterious crow brings him back for revenge and redemption.

programme.title: Species
programme.desc: She's beautiful, seductive, intelligent, and her charms could spell doom for the entire human race! Ben Kingsley, Forrest Whitaker, and Natasha Henstridge star in this adrenaline-charged sci-fi hit.

programme.title: Kalifornia
programme.desc: A graduate student and his girlfriend set out on a cross-country road trip to research a book they are writing on serial killers. Along the way, they pick up an ex-con and his girlfriend who will take them on a ride they'll never forget.

programme.title: Tank Girl
programme.desc: In this laugh-a-minute, futuristic Thriller, a mega-villain controls the world's water supply, and it's up to Tank Girl and her outrageous cohorts to end his greedy reign.

programme.title: Rollerball
programme.desc: Jonathan Cross (Chris Klein) is an all-American hotshot, the most popular player in the fastest and most extreme sport of all time: Rollerball.

programme.title: King of New York
programme.desc: Recently freed from prison, Frank White (Christopher Walken) begins to exterminate the drug lords who rose to power in his absence. When a group of enraged cops declares war on him, Frank's answer is to put a contract out on the cops.

programme.title: The Crow: City of Angels
programme.desc: This fast-moving, action-packed sequel to THE CROW follows the rise of murder victim Ashe Corven, brought back to life by a mysterious crow. With the help of a woman named Sarah, he exacts revenge on his killers one by one.

The mastermind behind New York's hottest club plucks a young man from those clamoring to get inside and hires him as a barback. With an all-star cast and a hit dance soundtrack, it's about to become the most legendary party on the planet.

programme.title: Zodiac
programme.desc: Based on the Robert Graysmith books about the real life notorious Zodiac, a serial killer who terrorized San Francisco with a string of seemingly random murders during the 1960s and 1970s.

programme.title: Lilies of the Field
programme.desc: Nominated for 5 Academy Awards® including Best Picture and winner of the Best Actor Oscar® for Sidney Poitier for his role as an itinerant handyman who stops to help five impoverished nuns and the small Arizona desert town in which they reside.

programme.title: Come Away
programme.desc: When their eldest brother dies, Peter and Alice seek to save their parents from despair until they are forced to choose between home and imagination, setting the stage for their iconic journeys into Wonderland and Neverland.

programme.title: St. Elmo's Fire
programme.desc: Seven friends, recent college graduates, are searching for a place in the real world, as they face issues of career and commitment. Rating: R

programme.title: Angel Eyes
programme.desc: After meeting under extraordinary life-and-death circumstances, a Chicago police officer (Lopez) and a lost soul named Catch (Caviezel) fall in love. While uncovering the truth about Catch, she is forced to deal with the secrets of her own past. Rated-R

programme.title: Zodiac
programme.desc: Based on the Robert Graysmith books about the real life notorious Zodiac, a serial killer who terrorized San Francisco with a string of seemingly random murders during the 1960s and 1970s.

programme.title: Season of the Witch
programme.desc: A 14th-century Crusader returns to a homeland devastated by the Black Plague. A beleaguered church commands the knight to transport an accused witch to a remote abbey, where monks will perform a ritual in hopes of ending the pestilence.

programme.title: The Dark Crystal
programme.desc: On another planet in the distant past, a Gelfling embarks on a quest to find the missing shard of a magical crystal, and to restore order to his world.

programme.title: The Man in the Iron Mask
programme.desc: Leonardo DiCaprio leads a phenomenal cast in this thrilling tale of majesty and Musketeers. When the excesses of France's arrogant King Louis XIV begin to threaten his subjects' very lives, the legendary Musketeers reunite to save their country!

programme.title: The Host
programme.desc: When an unseen enemy threatens mankind by taking over humans' bodies and erasing their minds, Melanie Stryder risks everything to protect the people she cares about most, proving that love can conquer all in a dangerous new world.

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: Superhumans defy a government plot to harness and abuse their powers. Chris Evans and Dakota Fanning (the TWILIGHT films) team in a pulse-pounding paranormal thriller.

programme.title: Love and Monsters
programme.desc: In a monster-infested world, Joel (Dylan O'Brien) learns his high school sweetheart (Jessica Henwick) is just 80 miles away. Now, Joel must discover his inner hero, facing unknown dangers on the impossible journey to be with the girl of his dreams.

programme.title: Carla's Cooking Show
programme.desc: Carla Lalli Music makes sausage and cauliflower pasta and grilled flatbreads plus a pantry tour.

programme.title: Carla's Cooking Show
programme.desc: Carla Lalli Music makes fresh pasta and spinach and artichoke lasagna.

programme.title: Carla's Cooking Show
programme.desc: Carla Lalli Music makes meatballs, zucchini fritters, and pasta cacio e walnut.

programme.title: Carla's Cooking Show
programme.desc: Carla Lalli Music makes spicy seafood stew, pasta with Sunday ragu, and power pancakes.

programme.title: Mexico: One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless
programme.desc: Tamales, tamales. From iconic corn-husked versions at the casual Tamales Teresita, as well as the denser, banana-leaf-wrapped Chiapanecos style, sold by a family outside the historic San Juan Bautisa church.

programme.title: Mexico: One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless
programme.desc: At the serene Roldan 37, Chef Romulo Mendoza prepares a perfect chile relleno. Then it is off to Pasilla de Humo and El Pescadito. To ensure at-home success, Rick provides in-depth details on the preparation of a classic: chiles rellenos.

programme.title: Mexico: One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless
programme.desc: When you say the word 'enchiladas,' chances are you are thinking about the saucy, cheesy affairs we all know and love. In Mexico City, you will find a variety of enchiladas, both in the simplest of markets and in the nicest of restaurants.

programme.title: Mexico: One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless
programme.desc: In the canon of Mexican tacos, the carnitas tacos has reached pinnacle. Golden, crispy pieces of pork nestled in a corn tortilla, coupled with a bracing squeeze of lime and a spoonful of creamy guacamole, represents pure taco perfection.

programme.title: Mexico: One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless
programme.desc: The corn tortilla is the canvas upon which Mexico creates some of its most classic cuisine. Rick shows us three styles of tortilla in Mexico City: steak tacos al carbon, bistec tacos a la plancha, and stewed tacos de guisado.

programme.title: Mexico: One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless
programme.desc: Did you know that the humble little meatball has a starring role in the Mexican kitchen? Explore traditional versions of albondingas in the old-school Bar Mancera, as well as modern versions in hipster haven Cicatriz, with Rick Bayless.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Sonoran wheat has shaped the cuisine of the entire Mexican north and is a staple of Sonoran cuisine. Pati tours one of Hermosillo’s oldest flour mills and gets a lesson on making coyotas, a traditional dessert, at a local bakery.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati spends a day in the kitchen with her middle son, Sami, cooking recipes inspired by her travels in Sonora that she knows he’ll love – beef and potato chimichangas, rice with lentils and caramelized onions, and an avocado and radish salad.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati travels to Sonora’s coast on the Sea of Cortez, where local legend Toño Contreras gives her a tour including shellfish on the beach, his restaurant Mariscos El Rey, and his home kitchen for some crave-worthy recipes.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati makes three classic Sonoran recipes, each one a meal in itself: a fish special called pescado zarandeado, a rich stew called gallina pinta, and a tasty dirty rice with clams. In Sonora, she visits vacation destination Puerto Peñasco.

programme.title: Simply Ming
programme.desc: Actress and James Beard Award-winning author and restaurateur Madhur Jaffrey shows audiences how to make Potatoes Marwari Style with Griddle Bread, while Ming prepares a Japanese Chicken Curry with Caramelized Onions and Cauliflower.

programme.title: Simply Ming
programme.desc: Master chef and Emmy-nominated host Rick Bayless creates a Green Chili Adobo Taco Duo with Shrimp, Caramelized Onion, and Roasted Chayote. Meanwhile, Ming makes a family-favorite: Surf-n-Turf Moo Shoo Wraps. It’s East meets Southwest!

programme.title: Simply Ming
programme.desc: James Beard Award-winning pastry chef Johnny Iuzzini whips up a decadent Frozen Dark and Stormy Soufflé while Ming makes Dark and Stormy Doughnuts.

programme.title: Simply Ming
programme.desc: It’s duck two ways as Shaun Hergatt, executive chef of Juni, makes a rich Acacia-Glazed Duck with Plum Puree and Shaved Fennel Salad. Ming matches with savory Thai Coconut Braised Duck Legs, Sweet Potato and Leeks, and Sambal-Plum Chutney.

programme.title: Project Fire: Cocktail Party
programme.desc: Host the ultimate barbecue cocktail party with grilled appetizers like jalapeño poppers, bacon-wrapped shrimp, and prosciutto-wrapped asparagus.

programme.title: Mysterious Places with Stacy Keach
programme.desc: What drove the hysteria of witchcraft trials? Historians, psychiatrists, and practicing witches seek out answers as we visit historic sites in Salem and Danvers.

programme.title: Mysterious Places with Stacy Keach
programme.desc: Even after years of in-depth study, this crude yet stunning arrangement of stones known as Stonehenge in the English countryside continues to astound.

programme.title: Mysterious Places with Stacy Keach
programme.desc: Tales of chivalry, romance and spiritual quest in one of England's most sacred sites: Glastonbury, The Isle of Avalon. We explore many questions surrounding this mysterious place.

programme.title: Mysterious Places with Stacy Keach
programme.desc: Explore the mystery of the ancient sites of the beautiful Land's End Peninsula in Cornwall. How were these monuments built? Are they organized along mystic energy Ley Lines?

programme.title: Mysterious Places with Stacy Keach
programme.desc: Chichen Itza is one of the most impressive of all the Mayan cities. Here we discover such mysterious structures as El Caracol, and the magnificent pyramid known as El Castillo.

programme.title: Mysterious Places with Stacy Keach
programme.desc: Explore the mysterious landscapes of three of England's most extraordinary sites: Glastonbury, Land's End, and Stonehenge, all which are within several hundred miles of one another.

programme.title: Mysterious Places with Stacy Keach
programme.desc: Deep in the Yucatan Peninsula, the pure Mayan city of Uxmal still stands. We visit the architecturally stunning Governor's Palace and the mysterious Pyramid of the Magician. What clues do they offer?

programme.title: Mysterious Places with Stacy Keach
programme.desc: Here is the incredible story of Teotihuacan, and how 200,000 of its inhabitants "vanished" around the year 750 A.D. We explore the mesmerizing ruins and latest underground discoveries.

programme.title: Mysterious Places with Stacy Keach
programme.desc: With its array of archeo-astronomical alignments, America's Stonehenge is possibly the most important archaeological site in North America. A major question is: who built this, and when?

programme.title: Mysterious Places with Stacy Keach
programme.desc: A church or a cathedral has stood on the hill at Chartres in France for over 1500 years. Let's join Stacy Keach as he unravels the mysteries of this sacred site.

programme.title: Mysterious Places with Stacy Keach
programme.desc: In 74 A.D., the fortress of Masada became the site of a bloodbath when 960 Jews committed suicide. Why did they do it? And why are some scientists now claiming it was actually a mass extermination?

programme.title: Mysterious Places with Stacy Keach
programme.desc: One mystical city, caught at the crossroads of three great religions, Jerusalem calls out across the ages. We'll travel to this timeless, sacred city and try to make sense of its mysteries.

programme.title: Mysterious Places with Stacy Keach
programme.desc: In this special edition of Mysterious Places, we capture the magic and majesty of the most extraordinary pre-Columbian cities in Mexico's Yucatan peninsula: Chichen Itza and Uxmal.

programme.title: Mysterious Places with Stacy Keach
programme.desc: In the city of Santiago de Compostella lies a magnificent cathedral that serves as a sacred shrine. The cathedral is said to contain the mortal remains of St. James.

programme.title: Mysterious Places with Stacy Keach
programme.desc: The mysterious palace of Knossos, found in Crete, is the center of ancient Minoan ceremonial culture. Let's find out what really went on in the dark halls of the palace's underground labyrinth.

programme.title: Mysterious Places with Stacy Keach
programme.desc: In the year 79 AD, Mt. Vesuvius erupted, burying the thriving cities of Pompeii and Herculaneum. Rediscovered in 1748, these cities provide an extraordinary glimpse into the lives of ancient Romans.

programme.title: Mysterious Places with Stacy Keach
programme.desc: Known in antiquity as the center of the world, Delphi is a sacred place where many gods were worshipped, foremost among them: Apollo, god of poetry, music, reason, and prophesy.

programme.title: Mysterious Places with Stacy Keach
programme.desc: Who were the Etruscans? Where did they come from, and why were they different from other ancient societies? Most mysteriously, what caused their rapid fall from power and virtual disappearance?

programme.title: Mysterious Places with Stacy Keach
programme.desc: In the outback of Australia, one of the world's most bizarre rock formations is huge, imposing, and orange. To the aborigines, it is the part of the Earth from where all life sprung.

programme.title: Mysterious Places with Stacy Keach
programme.desc: From Stone Age ruins to wedge graves from the Neolithic Age, South West Ireland's so-called Dingle Peninsula is a land of mysterious ancient monuments.

programme.title: Mysterious Places with Stacy Keach
programme.desc: In this special edition episode, explore the mysterious features of three of Europe's most extraordinary places: Galicia, Spain, Campania, Italy, and Delphi, Greece.

programme.title: Mysterious Places with Stacy Keach
programme.desc: Our journey with Stacy Keach to New Orleans probes the rich history of Big Easy rites and rituals from mysterious voodoo, haunting cemeteries, and the occult.

programme.title: Mysterious Places with Stacy Keach
programme.desc: Does a monstrous prehistoric monster live in the mysterious waters of Loch Ness? We travel to Scotland, interview experts from several fields, and catch up with the “loch-watchers".

programme.title: Mysterious Places with Stacy Keach
programme.desc: Some people have called the island of Menorca, Spain an open air museum. Specifically, they point to the thousands of archaeological sites scattered throughout the island.

programme.title: Murders of Hollywood
programme.desc: Sensational and shocking stories from Hollywood are not always fiction. Beyond anything a screenwriter could imagine, and with cast of famous stars and celebrities, this documentary goes behind the scenes to explore the real-life stories of murders in ...

programme.title: Silent Hill: Revelation
programme.desc: Heather Mason and her father have always tried to stay one step ahead of the malevolent forces intent on their destruction. But on the eve of her 18th birthday, a dangerous revelation leads her deeper into a demonic world.

programme.title: Crawl
programme.desc: As a hurricane tears through Florida, Haley rushes to find her father, who is injured and trapped in the crawl space of their home. With the storm intensifying and water levels rising, the pair face an even bigger threat lurking below the surface.

programme.title: Rogue (2007)
programme.desc: A rugged American adventure-travel journalist on assignment in the Australian outback encounters a man-eating crocodile.

programme.title: Succubus

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: El Lagarto finge entregarse a Rodrigo, pero le dispara; a su vez recibe un disparo mortal de Antonia. Alejandro y Gabriela viven una noche de amor intensa, mientras el celular de Alejandro recibe sucesivas llamadas por el intento de suicidio de Irene.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Verónica está preocupada, pues sabe que Lucho no se fue de San Pedro. La señora Guerra lleva a Rodrigo al hospital y no deja de seducirlo. Lagarto sufre un accidente.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Alejandro sufre por no poder ver a su hija y se emborracha. Verónica lo busca en el club, justo cuando Irene llega al lugar. Lucho se encarga de cuidar a Lucía. Chacón y Rodrigo están en el hospital. El comisionado besa a Antonia y Ricardo lo ve.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Sarita se encuentra con el nuevo dueño de la hacienda Trueba, con quien tiene una fuerte discusión, ella cae del caballo y se desmaya, cuando despierta está en la habitación de Franco.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Sarita y Franco pelean de nuevo, esta vez delante de todos los invitados a la fiesta en honor a los Reyes. Juan muere de celos al ver a Fernando con Gabriela, teme que Norma haya vuelto con él.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan conoce a su hijo y lo toma en sus brazos con ternura, Gabriela arma un escándalo hasta que Norma aclara que él tiene derechos porque es el padre, luego ella desacata la orden de su madre.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Paula renuncia a la herencia de los del Monte. Julieta se entera que Paula está embarazada de Juan y se obsesiona con hacerle daño. Los hermanos se dan cuenta que José quiere estafarlos. Rosario le pide a Lucas que se aleje de Nacho.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Adela logra comunicarse y descubre quién está detrás de su secuestro. Nacho acecha a Consuelo y ella logra descubrir que fue él quien la violó, y Rosario la ayuda a defenderse. Emilio comienza a recuperarse, pero evita que José lo sepa.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: La traición de José sale a la luz cuando Paula regresa a La Arboleda con noticias de Pablo y Adela. Ella entrega una prueba de que José buscaba quedarse con toda la herencia y le cuenta que no está segura de ser hija de Emilio del Monte.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: José es expulsado de la familia cuando se descubre su traición. Paula se arriesga para encontrar a Adela y Emilio, llega a los alrededores de la casa de los secuestradores y Esteban la retiene. Rosario le confiesa a Lucas quién la violó.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Eleven new teams take off on the journey of a lifetime from Venice Beach, Calif. and head for Rio de Janeiro, where teams take a thrilling helicopter ride and face a huge decision at the Fast Forward.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to the birthplace of Pope Francis, where they visit the church where he was baptized. Also, Racers are driven up a wall when they learn a tango with a twist.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Attention to detail is paramount during a meaty challenge and one team faces a penalty after a costly mistake.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: As Racers soar high above the breathtaking Victoria Falls toward a double U-turn, Team Texas uses their express pass in the hopes of eliminating The Green Team.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams conquer their fears in Zambia, Africa when they plunge more than 250 feet over the Zambezi River, feed a trio of crocodiles and walk with lions through the jungle.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to Paris where Racers soar high above the French countryside and "drop mics" with a popular French rapper.

programme.title: The Amazing Race

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack as he heads to the Umfolozi Big 5 Game Reserve in South Africa for amazing animal encounters.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he braves the waters of Botswana's Okavango Delta! The world's largest inland delta provides a beautiful home to thriving wildlife like Crocs, Hippos, and Elephants.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Get a glimpse of Jack in his own backyard on this trip to Bigfork, Montana. And, Jack and Sue visit Triple D Game Ranch to get an up-close look at bears, wolves, and even an elusive cougar.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Everybody loves baby animals – especially Jack and Sue! Check out some unpredictable moments from undeniably cute babies like wombats, koalas, elephants -- and even a black rhino named after you know who.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along on an epic adventure to meet the big cats of Tanzania. These top predators include Lions, Cheetahs, and Leopards.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Jack of All Trades
programme.desc: Caring for animals can be a big job! Join Jack for some on-the-job-training as he explores six incredible, dangerous and dirty animal jobs, like wrangling crocodiles, caring for elephants, herding cattle and a whole lot more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Armed with Armor
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he counts down wild creatures that come equipped with their very own body armor!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack travels to Rwanda where he meets up with some old friends and makes some new ones. Join Jack and his family as they encounter extremely rare golden monkeys while trekking through the jungle in search of endangered mountain gorillas.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Today, Jungle Jack is in Zambia getting an up-close look at some of the toughest reptiles on the planet – fierce and dangerous Nile Crocodiles! Then he takes a walk on the wild side with white rhino, giraffe, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and Suzi head deep into Rwanda's Virunga Mountains on a trek to find endangered Mountain Gorillas.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In Sao Paulo, Jack visits the famed Institute BuTanTan, which has been producing anti-snake bite serum since 1900. In research labs, Jack encounters Brazilian Rattlesnakes, Jararacas and 50,000 poisonous spiders.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Walking on the Wild Side
programme.desc: Today, Jungle Jack is leaving the safari truck behind and lacing up his walking shoes for a walk on the wild side, as he counts down seven unforgettable adventures he took on foot!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Jungle Jack meets up with amazing animal moms and the little ones they care for. A jaguar looking after her cub, a baby bear sleeping alongside its mom, a white rhino protecting her calf, a cheetah mom in South Africa and whole herd of elephant mammas!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Check out this adventure to the Atacama Desert in Chile, where Jack searches for wildlife in the most unlikely of places, and gets a first-hand look at what it's like to live in this harsh yet beautiful environment.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jungle Jack is heading to the Wild West to meet up with some of America's most iconic species! Bears, Wolves, Bison, Big Horn Sheep and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Jack visits a breeding project focused on saving the endangered condor, the largest flying bird in the world. With its unique location in the middle of prime condor habitat, “condor Hausi” hopes to reproduce the massive bird in captivity.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Creatures of the Night
programme.desc: Prepare for a fright as Wild Countdown is venturing into the night! Stealthy hunters equipped with night vision, giants so powerful they could crush you with a single step, plus bats, rats and deadly vipers!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Misunderstood Animals
programme.desc: Today, Jungle Jack is going to reveal the truth about some of the animal kingdom’s most misunderstood creatures, like sharks, stingrays, wolves, gators and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Baby, You're the Greatest
programme.desc: Jungle Jack is going more than a little baby crazy! Today, cute and cuddly creatures guaranteed to make you smile. A darling orangutan, wee little warthogs, a sleeping baby bear and more cuteness than you can count!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jack as he counts down six species that makes their homes at the top of the world: chimpanzees in mountains of Africa, guanacos in the Andes of Patagonia, Alaska’s enormous brown bears and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: The lush lands of Lope are home to rare and unique creatures like Forest Elephants, Forest Buffalo, and Red River Hogs. Plus loads of primates, and Jack has a close encounter with a gorilla!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he meets up with researchers on the front-lines of animal conservation as they work to protect Elephants, Lions, Rattlesnakes, Bats and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack for an adventure with rare and unique animals that all wear white. Arctic wolves, beluga whales, polar bears, white zebras and even an albino alligator!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack explores tributaries off the Panama Canal in search of wildlife like Capuchin Monkeys, Geoffroy's Tamarins, Spectacled Caimans, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In most homicides, police rely on motive to pursue a murderer. But when the killer is a stranger…the crime may go unsolved for years. It takes a full arsenal of forensic techniques…to trace… a lethal encounter.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Formed in the 1830s to protect settlers against Indian attack, the Rangers became part of the Texas Highway Patrol in 1935. Their role has continued to evolve to keep up with changing times; today it includes sophisticated forensics labs.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A victim usually never foresees danger when the perpetrator turns out to be a friend or a lover. Science and microscopic evidence can unmask these killers and find justice for those who are Loved To Death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When a murder is committed and deceit clouds the evidence, investigators turn to science and technology to uncover the truth and expose a murderous lie and capture the killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The forces of nature can reduce a body to bones in a matter of weeks. Using a unique combination of art and science, forensic anthropologists give victims a face long after they have been forgotten.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: An abandoned car outside Philadelphia brings heartbreak to a family and terror to a community. A young woman is dead, the killer gone. But the marks of his passage remain.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Most victims of multiple murderers are meticulously chosen because of a mutual connection with the killer or because they match an intricate set of criteria that fits the killer's MO.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Terrorism: Thanks to new technology and, perhaps, the approaching millennium, terrorism is a growing international threat. The Oklahoma City explosion and the bombing of the World Trade Center are just two of the incidents of this growing problem.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For the forensic entomologist, the insects that nest in dead bodies are like tiny witnesses to a crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A dog can be a dead man's best friend. Dogs have been trained to sniff out corpses, drugs, explosives, and missing persons. They're often the first to find the essential clue that sets an investigation in motion.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Explosives Investigations: The crime lab is the place where science meets murder. In New York State, Eleanor Fowler opened a small package, which as mailed to her home. When she lifted the lid the box exploded killing her instantly.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: They know as much about crime as any crime fighter, or any criminal. They're the crime writers, and through their eyes we see murder most foul.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Time of death is an important consideration in a murder investigation, but when a killer freezes, burns, or grinds his victim, even the most skilled medical examiner would be at a loss about how to calculate it.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Hiding a body can be difficult; it's sometimes easier to obscure or disguise the circumstances of the death, turning murder into suicide, or pinning the blame on someone else. The truth is told through subtle clues taken from the crime scene.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Janet is happy that her old friend, Randy, is dating Jack - until she discovers that Randy is married.

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Larry completely trusts Jack to show his teenage sister around town - until he discovers that they are still out at 2 a.m.

programme.title: Three's Company
